signals.headline: Kraken Announces IPO Plans | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Kraken Announces IPO Plans | YES | MED confidence**  
Kraken's IPO intentions confirmed in April 2026 market update, signaling exchange maturation and broader institutional crypto adoption, which could boost sentiment in prediction markets for crypto listings or regulatory progress.[1]

signals.headline: Kon Knueppel Confirmed as First NBA Rookie to Lead League in 3-Pointers Made | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kon Knueppel Confirmed as First NBA Rookie to Lead League in 3-Pointers Made | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Kon Knueppel, a small forward (likely with the Charlotte Hornets), has officially ended his rookie season as the first in NBA history to lead the league in made 3-pointers with 273 triples[1][2][3].  
This historic feat—another "never-been-done-before" achievement—caps his elite rookie campaign
matched_markets: Will Kon Knueppel win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?

signals.headline: Morgan Stanley's MSBT Spot Bitcoin ETF Launches with $34M Day-One Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Morgan Stanley's MSBT Spot Bitcoin ETF Launches with $34M Day-One Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This first spot Bitcoin ETF from a major U.S. bank debuted Tuesday (April 2026), adding institutional demand amid $471M net ETF inflows on April 6—the strongest since late February—potentially driving prices toward $75K-$80K and impacting prediction markets on BTC breakouts.[2]
matched_markets: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $76,000 on April 18?

signals.headline: JPMorgan Acknowledges CLARITY Act Progress | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
JPMorgan Acknowledges CLARITY Act Progress | YES | MED confidence**  
JPMorgan notes advancement of the CLARITY Act, aligning with XRP community views on U.S. crypto regulation; while not directly BTC/ETH, it hints at clearer frameworks that could resolve prediction market bets on policy outcomes.[1]
